mapper.sql: id, user_id, order_no, subscription_id, amount, pay_status, pay_time, trade_no, pay_channel, order_status, refund_amount, refund_time, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_order ( user_id, order_no, subscription_id, amount, pay_status, pay_time, trade_no, pay_channel, order_status, refund_amount, refund_time, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{userId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{orderNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{subscriptionId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{amount, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{payStatus, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{payTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{tradeNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{payChannel, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{orderStatus, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{refundAmount, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{refundTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM t_order WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM t_order ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT
FROM t_order WHERE user_id = #{userId, jdbcType=BIGINT} ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT o.,
FROM t_order o WHERE o.id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT o.,
FROM t_order o WHERE o.user_id = #{userId, jdbcType=BIGINT} ORDER BY o.create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE t_order SET pay_status = #{payStatus, jdbcType=INTEGER}, pay_time = #{payTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, trade_no = #{tradeNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}

UPDATE t_order SET refund_amount = #{refundAmount, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, refund_time = #{refundTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, pay_status = #{payStatus, jdbcType=INTEGER}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO t_order ( user_id, order_no, subscription_id, amount, pay_status, pay_time, trade_no, pay_channel, order_status, refund_amount, refund_time, create_time, update_time ) VALUES
( #{item.userId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.orderNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.subscriptionId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.amount, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.payStatus, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.payTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.tradeNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.payChannel, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.orderStatus, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.refundAmount, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.refundTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM t_order WHERE id IN
#{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: SELECT CONCAT( #{prefix, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d%H%i%s'), LPAD(FLOOR(RAND() * 1000000), 6, '0') ) AS order_no
